note: LM catalog for the cascade (STT -> LM -> TTS) engine. Change `default` to switch the model every cascade persona uses; add entries to `models` to make more available (no live API list needed). A persona can also pin a model via `lmModelId` in lib/realtime/cascade-agent.ts. `backends[*].envKey` names a fnox/env secret read server-side in app/api/llm/route.ts — values never reach the browser. `supportsThinking` sends chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking:false (reasoning models); leave false for APIs that reject unknown fields (e.g. Mistral). See README 'Configuring the cascade LM'.
